articles.title: Partnerships & Stakeholders: Science and Technology Community
articles.description: The role of global science, academia, research and innovation is enshrined in the Sendai Framework for Disaster Risk Reduction where it is recognized for the catalytic, boundary-pushing and transformative potential it holds for addressing the dynamic drivers of disaster risk.

articles.title: Maximum Information
articles.description: Founded in 2020, Maximum Information is committed to increasing societal resilience to disasters through evolving risk modelling of natural hazards.

articles.title: Building business resilience in Venice: UNDRR and VSF put SMEs to the test at Venice Climate Week 2026
articles.description: UNDRR and the VSF brought disaster risk reduction to the heart of the business community, hosting Business Under Pressure — an interactive scenario exercise for small and medium-sized enterprises as part of Venice Climate Week 2026.

articles.title: Barbados: Strengthening disaster resilience of MSMEs through business continuity planning - Guidance and sectoral templates
articles.description: This document provides guidance for Micro, Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (MSMEs) in Barbados to develop a basic Business Continuity Plan, eventually aligning with the highest international standards. It includes 5 sectoral templates.

articles.title: Euro-Mediterranean partners advance cooperation on civil protection and disaster risk management
articles.description: Representatives from across the Euro-Mediterranean region gathered for the UfM Civil Protection Meeting to advance regional cooperation on disaster risk management and support the 2030 UfM Action Plan on Civil Protection and Disaster Risk Management.

articles.title: 2027 RISK Award "Homes at risk: Climate resilience for informal settlements"
articles.description: Apply now for the 2027 RISK Award, endowed with a project funding of up to €100,000! Phase I runs from 1 June to 31 July 2026 (12:00 CET).

articles.title: Save the date: Europe & Central Asia Regional Platform for Disaster Risk Reduction, Romania 25–27 May 2027
articles.description: The next Europe & Central Asia Regional Platform for Disaster Risk Reduction will take place in Romania from the 25th to 27th of May 2027

articles.title: When small businesses restart, cities recover: How Barcelona built an SME resilience ecosystem, and what other cities can learn from it
articles.description: How Barcelona, with support from UNDRR through its Strengthening the Disaster Resilience of SMEs initiative, began addressing vulnerabilities among SMEs by building an ecosystem designed to support business continuity and long-term preparedness.

articles.title: IDRLF
articles.description: International Disaster Resilience Leaders Forum in Incheon (IDRLF)The IDRLF is an annual international event convening national and local governments in Inche

articles.title: Calls for Proposals: Towards evidence-based decision making and risk investment for disaster risk reduction and early warning in Eastern Africa
articles.description: A grant to upgrade the Kenya national risk profile using the probabilistic approach and conduct DRR integrated fiscal risk analysis and recommendations.
